testcase.name: MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-1 · /pages/guest/capture/index · onLoad mint → phase=IDLE + nav + consent rendered
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-2 · tap consent checkbox → PATCH consent 200 → phase=CONSENT_PENDING + Shutter enabled
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-3 · tap shutter → CAMERA_ACTIVE · stub takePhoto → UPLOADING (camera 真 wxml · IDE 跳长 mount)
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-4 · analyze-by-url 429 → phase=QUOTA_EXHAUSTED + 整页挡板 + 立即注册 CTA
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-5 · analyze-by-url 502 → phase=ERROR + guest-error-banner + 重试按钮
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-6 · poll getResult → READY · 4 卡片渲染 + 保存 CTA 可点
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-7 · result.status="DONE" 上游真值 · MP 视同 READY (wire 差异防回归)
MP-CATCHUP-C-GUEST · P-GUEST-CAPTURE MP page (Phase 3 Coder) > TC-8 · READY 态 tap 保存 CTA (storage 无 jwt) → navigateTo login
